core_payload.content:
# Generative AI Tile Assistant Concept

## 1. Purpose
Define an assistive AI layer that proposes tile design alternatives from style intent, room constraints, and catalog inventory.

## 2. Functional Scope
Interpret natural language prompts, generate multiple variants, and explain tradeoffs in cost and installation complexity.

## 3. Safety
Recommendations remain advisory and traceable with prompt and output provenance preserved.

## 4. Integration
This concept integrates with scanning and layout capsules to provide an auditable end to end design assistant.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Generative AI Tile in the Dream branch is archived alongside the rest of the TileSims line so its future design-copilot vision remains stored without active execution. It still imagines more explainable alternative generation, better cost-aware style exploration, and tighter coupling between user intent, geometry constraints, and execution consequences before a design is accepted. The concept matters because generative design becomes shallow when it optimizes only aesthetics. In archive mode Dream preserves this accountable creativity layer as future product leverage.
